personal.name: Vaishnavi B
personal.title: Software Engineer (Full Stack & Machine Learning)
personal.tagline: Proactive developer with a solid foundation in machine learning and full-stack development, dedicated to creating responsive applications and reliable AI models.
personal.bio: I am a detail-oriented developer skilled in Python and web technologies with experience in deploying machine learning algorithms and building responsive web applications. I focus on engaging user experiences and leveraging technical skills to drive efficiency.
personal.currentRole: B.E. Student in Information Science and Engineering
personal.currentRoleDescription: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering at Global Academy Of Technology, maintaining a CGPA of 7.04 while developing advanced projects in deep learning and full-stack development.

about.title: About
sections: I am a proactive individual with a solid foundation in machine learning and full-stack development. My experience includes creating responsive applications and advanced AI models, with a focus on engaging user experiences and reliable outcomes.

I am skilled in Python, JavaScript, and Java, alongside modern web technologies like React.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. I am ready to leverage these technical skills to drive efficiency and user-centric solutions.

I have successfully implemented diverse projects ranging from 3D Protein Prediction using Deep Learning to Full Stack To-Do applications, demonstrating a versatile ability to tackle both complex backend logic and interactive frontend design.

experience.title: Full Stack Web Development Intern
experience.description: Developed responsive web applications and an e-commerce application using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Integrated Node.js/Express.js back-end systems.

projects.title: 3D Protein Prediction using Deep Learning
projects.description: A deep learning model to predict 3D protein structures from amino acid sequences.
projects.longDescription: Implemented a deep learning model to predict protein tertiary structures using CNNs, RNNs, and Transformers. Applied sequence embeddings and evolutionary profiles for feature extraction, validating results against PDB structures for applications in drug discovery.

projects.title: Full Stack To-Do List Web Application
projects.description: A responsive task management app with CRUD functionality and drag-and-drop features.
projects.longDescription: Designed and developed a responsive web application to manage tasks. Implemented the frontend using React.js and the backend with Node.js and Express.js. Integrated MongoDB for persistent task storage.

projects.title: Pothole Detection using AI/ML
projects.description: Computer vision model to detect and classify potholes from road images for improved safety.
projects.longDescription: Developed a computer vision model using OpenCV and trained a CNN for classification. Achieved 80-90% accuracy on test datasets, improving detection reliability compared to baseline methods.

education.institution: Global Academy Of Technology, Bangalore, India
Sri Chaitanya Techno School, Bangalore, India

certifications.name: Software Engineering and Agile Software Development
